values: Starter tables for mapping recognized sign actions to Philippine language outputs.
Use DirectTranslations for single model actions. Use PhraseRules when multiple recognized actions form a natural phrase.
All starter translations are marked needs_native_review. Replace AI_DRAFT with translator IDs after human validation.
Alphabet signs are in AlphabetOutputs and should usually be displayed directly, not translated.
recognized actions -> phrase-rule lookup -> direct translation fallback -> display selected target language
Do not deploy emergency or abuse-related outputs until reviewed by native speakers and accessibility stakeholders.

values: Use Filipino for broad Philippine national-language output; regional Tagalog wording may vary.
Validate with speakers from the intended deployment area, e.g. Cebu, Bohol, Mindanao.
Also written as Ilocano/Iloko in some systems; keep one internal code consistently.
Regional and orthographic variants are common; store alternates as separate variant rows.
Validate region-specific variants, especially Iloilo versus Negros usage.
